title: Studio Milestone History
organization: Two Marshalls Studios - Studio Operating System (TMS-OS)
summary: Preserves verified completed and active studio milestones without inventing missing history.

sections.title: Purpose
paragraphs: This document is the permanent milestone history for Two Marshalls Studios. It preserves development milestones that can be verified from recovered records and current approved documentation.

sections.title: Recovery Rule
paragraphs: Only milestones supported by verified records are recorded as confirmed.
Missing milestone numbers, dates, names, or completion details are not reconstructed by assumption. Unverified historical milestones remain open for controlled recovery.

sections.title: Milestone Status Definitions
paragraphs: Completed — verified as finished in recovered or current approved records.
Active — verified as the current milestone in progress.
Recovered Reference — milestone information exists, but is not yet sufficient for full verification.
Unresolved — historical milestone details have not yet been recovered.

rows: Last completed development milestone at the verified recovery checkpoint.
Current active milestone during WS-049AR. Historical recovery and documentation reconciliation are in progress.

sections.title: Verified Milestone Sequence
paragraphs: MILE-013 — Fully Modular StudioDB — Completed
MILE-014 — Complete Historical Recovery — Active

sections.title: Historical Recovery Boundary
paragraphs: Milestones before MILE-013 are not yet listed as verified because the available recovery checkpoint does not provide enough confirmed detail to recreate them safely. They remain eligible for later controlled recovery from source records.

sections.title: Future Milestone Entry Requirements
paragraphs: Milestone ID
Milestone title
Status
Date or work-session reference when verified
Source evidence
Completion result or current-state effect

sections.title: Current State
paragraphs: Verified completed milestones: 1
Verified active milestones: 1
Verified milestone records in this document: 2
Historical milestone recovery before MILE-013: Unresolved / controlled recovery required

sections.title: Next Controlled Action
paragraphs: Continue historical recovery using verified source material. Add earlier milestones only when their identity, status, and supporting evidence can be confirmed.

sections.title: Permanent Statement
paragraphs: This document is the permanent milestone-history record for Two Marshalls Studios. It must remain evidence-based and must not be expanded through assumption.

revisionHistory.summary: Connected the verified permanent document to the shared structured Document Template Engine.

verification.method: Converted from the recovered DOCX source used to create the verified Google Headquarters document.
